verbatim_text: Please. So here, you want to compare two approaches. One is prompting a language model. So for 50,000 tries, you get some solution, some distribution. And so you compare that with updating every 50 steps? That's right. Right. But I mean, you get 1,000 milliseconds. At what point do you know this is the right time to stop? Or can I continue going? You can continue going. It's really just a matter of your compute budget. You can say that, you know, once I'm top of the leaderboard, which means I've beaten the best human, I want to stop. But you don't have to.
